subject: [PATCH 09/14] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds read-write protection (RWP) fault delivery to the userfaultfd mechanism, allowing userspace to track and resolve RWP faults. It introduces new functions to handle RWP faults at different memory hierarchy levels and exposes a new UAPI to register for RWP fault notifications. The patch also updates various kernel files to support RWP faults in anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types. The approach taken is to wire the fault side of RWP tracking and provide userspace with a way to resolve RWP faults using the userfaultfd interface.
